name: Butler
text: Sorry for the wait dear guests. The kitchen took a while to prepare for your meals, if you would follow me, I'll lead you to the dining room.
Norton was the first to move and follow the butler, you followed soon after. Richard trailing behind you slowly.
As you entered the dining room, you could smell the appetizing aroma from the table to the entrance.
Making your way to the nearest chair, you notice the food in front was something you enjoyed. You wonder, how did they know what food you enjoy...

name: MainChar (Internal)
text: 'If they know something from my past, it's not as big of a surprise if they know what my favorite food is...'
